feature_name: Automated API Status Monitoring and Health Checks
description: Integrate automated, scheduled health checks for listed APIs to detect downtime, SSL certificate validity, and response latency. This will enhance the reliability of the API directory by adding a real-time status indicator for each entry and alerting maintainers to broken links or services.
functional_requirements: Extend `scripts/validate/links.py` to perform periodic HTTP/S requests to API endpoints and record response codes, latency, and SSL expiry dates.
Add a new `scripts/monitor/health.py` module that runs via GitHub Actions scheduled workflows, storing results in a timestamped JSON log file within a `monitor/` directory.
Update the main project README generation to include a status badge (e.g., 'Operational', 'Degraded', 'Down') for each API based on the latest health check results.
Implement a reporting script `scripts/monitor/report.py` that analyzes logs and opens GitHub Issues for APIs that fail consecutive health checks.
Ensure the monitoring respects API rate limits by implementing exponential backoff and caching, referencing existing validation patterns in `scripts/validate/format.py`.
